metadata.title: DAP · Let's raise up leaders together
metadata.description: A special opportunity for pastors and leaders: enroll 12 people and take the Diploma at no cost.

footer.privacy: Private page. Do not share publicly.

hero.subheadlineLead: Your leadership can open doors for many…

message.leadStart: We believe pastors and leaders should have access to
message.body: That's why we're opening a special opportunity for those who want to drive the growth of their people.

rule.card1Highlight: you take the Diploma AT NO COST.
rule.card2Highlight: you both take the Diploma FREE.
rule.openBody: You can invite whoever wants to grow with you: leaders, servers, volunteers, members, youth, entrepreneurs. Anyone willing to learn counts.

network.body: Every person trained alongside you opens doors for more. The network grows, territories are transformed.

benefits.body: 8 dimensions, 72 weeks. DAP forms the complete leader: pastor, administrator, reformer, communicator, mentor, entrepreneur, strategist, and spiritual governor.

biblical.title: Biblical training
biblical.desc: Solid foundations, apostolic doctrine with a modern vision of the Kingdom.

leadership.title: Leadership
leadership.desc: Character, governance, mentoring. You form leaders who form leaders.

finances.title: Finances
finances.desc: Stewardship, Kingdom economy, multiplication with wisdom.

administration.title: Administration
administration.desc: Structure, order, systems that sustain ministry growth.

business.title: Business
business.desc: Plant Kingdom businesses. Influence from the marketplace and culture.

technology.title: Technology & AI
technology.desc: Master the tools that rule the 21st century. Without losing your soul.

communication.title: Modern communication
communication.desc: Storytelling, media, personal brand. Your message reaches further.

government.title: Kingdom government
government.desc: Reform territories. Apostolic authority that goes beyond the pulpit.

finalCta.waMessage: Hi, I saw the opportunity for pastors at DAP and I want to activate it.
finalCta.button: I want to activate this opportunity
finalCta.note: We'll respond to you personally on WhatsApp.

error.title: We had a problem loading this page.
error.body: The error has been logged and we'll look into it. In the meantime, you can try again or go back to home.
